use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in SaaS applications
Destructive action buttons with proper visual warning
Ghost buttons for minimal UI contexts
Icon buttons for compact toolbars and tooltips
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Features shadow effects, focus-visible outlines, and disabled states. Part of the ruixen.ui design system, designed for flexible composition across SaaS and dev-tool applications.
